refnamediv.refpurpose: Tag a raster column as being an overview of another.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Adds constraints on a raster column that are used to display information in the raster_overviews raster catalog.
The ovfactor parameter represents the scale multiplier in the overview column: higher overview factors have lower resolution.
When the ovschema and refschema parameters are omitted, the first table found scanning the search_path will be used.

refsection.title: Examples
